productName: 0.5g Live Resin Inf. 2 Pack Joints - Arjan Haze - 1g
description: A sativa infused joint built on Arjan Haze and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — a sweet, spicy-citrus aroma with a bright, energetic, cerebral feel, with a clear, creative buzz. A little goes a long way.
